title: Practical Charms
prose: {{dada-professor}} has you practicing the Shield Charm this term — Protego — which is considerably harder to cast under pressure than it looks when a professor demonstrates it calmly at the front of the room.

By the end of the lesson your arm aches and you've been knocked flat twice, but on the third try the jinx aimed at you actually rebounds — a small, solid kind of satisfaction that homework essays never quite manage to produce.

choices.label: Head back to the common room, pleased with yourself.
